programme.title: Ron Ruhman
programme.desc: Ron has been called a “High Energy Seinfeld”. He brings a very energetic style to the stage as he shares his interesting slant on day-to-day life in an act that is clean, smart, and very entertaining.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Paul was raised as a sports fanatic in the tiny town of Owego, in upstate New York. After four years of playing college basketball, somehow he graduated. Aside from playing in the NBA, his dream job was to talk about sports for a living. Paul then moved to California after landing a television sports anchor job but found out quickly that he was “too much of a smart-ass” for TV news. After he was fired, Paul took his unique sense of humor to comedy club stages all over the country. In 2005, Paul was selected to perform at the HBO Comedy Festival in Las Vegas. Morrissey has also been a finalist in several national comedy competitions including Wendy's Comedy Challenge, Comedy Central's Open Mic Fight and Maxim's Real Men of Comedy.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: Jonnie W: Not My Cup of Tea
programme.desc: Jonnie W addresses the Tennessee-born stereotype. Whether or not he matches up to it, his voiced inner monologue is sure to leave you on his side when it comes to new country radio, double decker grave plots, and the difference between fish and beef.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Mike Burton delivers his comedy with high energy, great storytelling, and hilarious facial expressions. Mike started his stand-up comedy career in 1996 first performing in the local clubs in NYC, then gaining nationwide popularity. He has been on TV shows, independent feature films, and commercials for HP and Modells. Mike has also performed in daytime shows: Rachel Ray, The Chew, and ABC's The Revolution.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Half-Persian and raised in a religious family, K-Von's comedy unites sharp cultural riffs with clean delivery. In this special he takes on political correctness, cyber bullying, and the utility of cargo pants.

programme.title: Ty Barnett
programme.desc: Ty Barnett, a Chicago native, got his start at Seattle's Comedy Underground. Whoopi Goldberg called Ty “hilarious” and reviewers have said he is “thought provoking” and “edgy”. All this praise earned him many television appearances. He hosted the Food Network's Mealin' and Dealin', Discovery Family's Babies Behaving Badly and Beasts Behaving Badly, and appeared in over 15 national commercials. It all began when he was one of the two finalists on the most-watched and Emmy nominated season of Last Comic Standing. Ty went on to multiple Tonight Show appearances where Jay Leno called Ty “one of the funniest comedians working”. He also appeared in HBO's Bad Boys of Comedy, his own Comedy Central Presents and one-hour special Issues. Ty was named “one to watch” by the Hollywood Reporter. He's also been seen on the sitcoms Samantha Who, Til Death, Life in Pieces, NickMom Night Out and Tosh.O. His comedy album, Grown Man-Baby Steps is a favorite on Sirius XM.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: Tom Simmons: Peace, Love and Whatnot

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: With his Sharp Delivery, quick wit, and unique style, Mike Toomey has been a favorite at comedy clubs and special events since 1982. A Daily performer on The WGN Morning News in Chicago, Mike has appeared in concert with such names as George Carlin, Wayne Newton, Crosby, Stills & Nash, and Reba McIntyre. He has performed on numerous television programs including HBO's U.S. Comedy Arts Festival in Aspen Colorado MTV's Half Hour Comedy Hour and A&E's Comedy on the Road. The Chicago Tribune calls Mike, "One of the funniest and most talented performers to ever work in Chicago." For an evening of uncontrollable laughs, Mike Toomey is a sure choice!

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Jeff Capri uses his cynical perspective to riff on oxygen bars, playing darts to get in shape, and men taking their shirts off before fights.

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of MST3K bring their comedic riffing treatment to the educational short Families: Earning And Spending! Join Mike, Kevin and Bill and spend a little well-earned time with Families: Earning and Spending!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic riffing treatment to this cheesy 50's horror classic about a lovely woman attracted to beasts.

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: Join former MST3K stars Mike, Kevin, and Bill and have a blast with the meandering, low-impact heroics of Superargo and the Faceless Giants! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (former stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 aka MST3K).

programme.title: Mechanic Resurrection
programme.desc: Arthur Bishop [Jason Statham] returns as the Mechanic in the sequel to the 2011 action-thiller. When the deceitful actions of a cunning but beautiful woman [Jessica Alba] force him to return to the life he left behind, Bishop's life is once again in danger as he has to complete an impossible list of assassinations of the most dangerous men in the world.

programme.desc: In modern Verona, where women seeking their Romeos leave letters to Juliet, a young writer (Amanda Seyfried) finds a life-altering 50-year-old letter.

programme.title: Stonewall (2015)

programme.title: The Wedding Chapel
programme.desc: Uninspired and newly single painter Sara is down on her luck and wants nothing more than to get away from her problems. When she decides to take a trip to visit her mom,she becomes involved in the efforts to save a local church which is in danger of being closed down. Determined to help preserve the historic building,Sara embarks on a mission that not only gives her a new outlook on life,but enables her mother to rekindle a long lost love from her past...a story about love,forgiveness and embracing new beginnings.

programme.title: These Old Broads
programme.desc: They swore they'd never work together again, their shocking reunion-still throwing tantrums, still stealing headlines, still making producers cry!

programme.desc: Doug Chesnic, a Secret Service agent is assigned to protect former first lady Tess Carlisle. Chesnic is desperate to get out of it due to Tess' high-maintenance personality and petty demands. However things change when Tess is kidnapped.

programme.title: The Heroes Of Telemark
programme.desc: It is 1942 and Norway is under the thumb of the Nazis. In a Norwegian factory, Nazis are producing "heavy water," an essential element in the production of atomic weapons. The leader of the Norwegian underground is enlisted by British intelligence to aid in destroying the factory.

programme.title: Marooned
programme.desc: Three American astronauts are stranded in space when their retros won't fire.

programme.title: All The King's Men

programme.title: Affair In Trinidad
programme.desc: A mysterious death in Trinidad finds a beautiful nightclub singer and her suspicious brother-in-law caught up in a web of espionage as they try to bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: The Fighting Seabees
programme.desc: The construction foreman of a fighting work battalion to be stationed near Japanese lines in the Pacific and a naval commander colleague compete in Washington for a journalist, while preparing to engage the enemy in a massive assault.

programme.title: Paradise, Hawaiian Style
programme.desc: Elvis takes to the skies over the island paradise of Kauai. He's a partner in a helicopter charter service. Romance, naturally, is in the air for the King…but his business may be grounded.

programme.title: Fun in Acapulco
programme.desc: Elvis heads south of the border, where he's fired as a boat hand, hired as a lifeguard and singer, admired by local beauties and inspired to jump off a 136-foot cliff. Put another way: he overcomes a fear of heights in spectacular fashion.

programme.title: Island In The Sky
programme.desc: Set after World War II, John Wayne plays Dooley, a former army pilot flying transport missions, who is forced to crash-land his fuel-starved plane on a frozen lake after it strays from its course.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: An adventure that follows a masked outlaw as he investigates mysterious raids on the old western front

programme.title: The Glenn Miller Story

programme.title: The Killers
programme.desc: An insurance investigator pieces together the events that led up to a boxer's murder.

programme.title: Lady On a Train
programme.desc: A mystery writer helps a woman solve the murder that she witnessed from her train window.

programme.title: Looks That Kill
programme.desc: The story of a teenage boy who deals with the ups and downs of being lethally attractive. Starring Brandon Flynn, Julia Goldani, and Ki Hong Lee.

programme.title: Addicted to Fresno
programme.desc: Martha (Natasha Lyonne) is a lonely but stoic lesbian whose sister Shannon (Judy Greer), a sex addict with no impulse control, ends up back in Fresno.

programme.title: Bad Therapy
programme.desc: Bob and Susan see a marriage counselor, Judy Small, to improve their relationship. However, Judy Small's dark impulses end up bringing Bob and Susan's marriage to the breaking point. Starring Alicia Silverstone and Rob Corddry.

programme.title: Ice Cream in the Cupboard
programme.desc: Carmen and Pat's marriage is turned upside down by a diagnosis of early onset Alzheimer's. As the time draws closer when Carmen will no longer recognize her husband, Pat finds refuge in his memories of their life together.

programme.title: The Competition
programme.desc: A woman inspires millions with her 'PIG Theory' blog promoting a formula that keeps you safe from cheating until she meets a handsome lawyer who challenges her to a competition to prove her theory wrong. It's a competition! Who will win

programme.title: Inspiring Love
programme.desc: When Isla's art unexpectedly sells to Mark, a second commission sees them falling in love.

programme.title: Love on the Reef

programme.title: My Mother's Stalker

programme.desc: Biography of country music star Barbara Mandrell looks at her early career, and follows her career through the tragic auto accident in 1984. Mandrell portrays herself in her later life, and Maureen McCormick offers a good portrayal of the younger Mandrell.

programme.title: Love Again
programme.desc: A distant father (Kevin Sorbo) and losing his girlfriend to his best friend (Ben Davies) leads Nathan (Jason Burkey) on a journey of rediscovery.

programme.title: Family Gathering
programme.desc: Metropolitan working woman Lisa Rayborn returns to her hometown of White Tail Creek to pay respects to her late mother.

programme.title: Charms for The Easy Life
programme.desc: In the backwoods of North Carolina, a proud folk healer, Charlie Kate, her lovesick daughter Sophia, and her granddaughter Margaret share the remarkable stories of their lives with soulful humor, iron wills, and inspiring resilience. Based on the New York Times bestselling novel by Kaye Gibbons.

programme.title: Joint Security Area
programme.desc: One day, a border guard is killed by a rifle bullet in the demilitarized zone between North and South Korea.

programme.title: Luck-key

programme.title: Night of The Undead
programme.desc: So-hee marries a perfect man. One day, she suspects that he isn't as he seems and hires a private detective.

programme.title: Don't Buy The Seller
programme.desc: It all started with a second hand app. Soo-hyun's comment on the app makes her a serial killer's target.

programme.title: Pastor Thorne: Lust of the Flesh
programme.desc: Pastor Jacob Thorne has a prominent church and a stellar reputation in his city however, as his fame continues to grow, it is also blinding him causing him to lose focus on what really matters: his family. However, once his son blows into town, his life begins to go on an unexpected whirlwind that could cause his life to take an unwanted spiral downhill.

programme.title: Non-Disclosure
programme.desc: A new comer to a company climbs the corporate ladder very quickly, but pays a cost behind closed doors to get there.

programme.title: No Love Lost
programme.desc: After finalizing their divorce Noah and Moriah find themselves going from lovers to roommates. Moriah has moved on already and began dating her co-worker Anthony, 6 months before the divorce was final. Noah is still in love with her but find himself falling for a waitress named Rochelle. Rochelle, with the help of his best friend Quincy, give Noah the motivation to stand up to Moriah in situations where he would be meek to say the least. Noah and Quincy also find themselves battling women issues, Quincy with his boss, Yvette, of which he's having a sexual relationship with and Noah who battles Moriah's new man, Anthony, and Rochelle's old one, Casey.

programme.title: Seal
programme.desc: Seals one-of-a-kind soaring, husky baritone voice is perfect for any genre. Hes delighted fans and earned critical acclaim while staying true to classic, honest songwriting in his remarkable two-decade career. And now, hes done it again with the release of his exceptional sixth studio album Soul. Together with legendary music producer David Foster, Seal adds his signature touch to some of the best soul songs ever created. In a stunning performance, Seal evokes an era when music vividly captured emotion and romance. Joined by Foster, as well as a choir and string section, Seal takes on Ann Pebbles I Cant Stand the Rain, Sam Cookes A Change Is Gonna Come, and Harold Melvin and the Blue Notes If You Dont Know Me By Now. Tune in and catch more timeless favorites and hits like Kiss From a Rose.

programme.title: Vivir a Destiempo

programme.title: 100% Futbol
programme.desc: Ivonne Almaraz, Robert Testas y Carlos Reynoso e Ivonne Almaraz te ofrecerán la más completa cobertura de futbol varonil y femenil, así como el mejor análisis, debate y entretenimiento en 100% Futbol.

programme.title: Corazón indomable: Necesitas ayuda
programme.desc: El padre le informa a Maricruz que tiene que desalojar el rancho lo antes posible José Antonio se encuentra con Octavio y le informa que Maricruz se va a casar con Álvaro.

programme.title: Destilando amor: Problemas familiares
programme.desc: Sofía le reclama a Rodrigo por alejar a su familia por culpa de Gaviota, él le exige no entrometerse en su vida. Alonso hace un brindis por Gaviota y asegura que es una mujer increíble, ella se pone nerviosa al escuchar sus palabras.

programme.title: Teresa: Falsa amistad
programme.desc: A Mayra se le rompe el corazón al descubrir que Rubén y Genoveva son amantes. Teresa engaña a Fernando diciéndole que está comenzando a enamorarse de él.

programme.title: Rubí: Un nuevo proyecto
programme.desc: Alejandro llega a Cancún y se encuentra con su hermana Sofía y sus papás Don Genaro se enfurece al ver que Luis y Sofía juntos y cree que puede ser descubierto.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre: Dos amores
programme.desc: Sofía le dice a Demián que no puede corresponder su amor, pero él está dispuesto a pelear por ella. Antes de irse del pueblo, Rosario decide acompañar a Armando para abrir la caja fuerte de Fernando. Juan busca a Sofía, pero ella lo rechaza.

programme.title: Al diablo con los guapos: Gran desesperación
programme.desc: Valeria le dice a Rocky que fue Luciana quien lo mandó golpear. Hugo intenta pasar la noche con Mili por la fuerza. Constancio y Luciana continúan teniendo encuentros a espaldas de Néstor y Andrea.

programme.title: Vino el amor: Un amor imposible
programme.desc: Sonia se sorprende tras enterarse que Graciela y David se casarán. Por otro lado, David habla con Luciana y le confiesa todo lo que siente por ella.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Manuel le recrimina a Rosario que haya mentido respecto a su lugar de origen. Matilde le dice que Rosario tiene derecho a guardar secretos. Manuel le dice a Antonia que le buscará casa en el pueblo.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Malvina planea hacer que Mística sea la nueva novia de Jorge Luis. Mística aprovechará la fiesta de Jorge Luis para poder reconquistarlo.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Santiago le propone a Meche que se con él. La madrina de Mística le aconseja que se case con don Sebastián para tener mucho dinero y prestigio. Meche teme que su hermano muera debido a que necesita un tipo de sangre difícil de conseguir.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Sergio conoce a su hija y está decidido a ayudar a Marimar Arturo le confiesa a su mamá y a su hermana que se va a casar.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Sergio descubre que Bella es Marimar y le exige una explicación, pues es el padre de la hija de ella. Bella le dice al gobernador que se casará con él.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Nandito duda de que María lo haya querido salvar y piensa que es una asesina. Soraya confronta a María en la cárcel para provocarla y acusarla de haberla querido matar también. María le reprocha a Luis Fernando su infidelidad.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: La compañera de celda de María resulta ser Penélope, quien empieza a hacerle la vida miserable. Soraya trata de convencer a Luis Fernando que María y Nandito solo querían hacerle daño.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Meche se encuentra muy agradecida con Jorge Luis, ya que, gracias a él, su hermano se ha recuperado del accidente. Jorge Luis se pelea con Santiago al escuchar las cosas que le dice a su padre.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Meche duda del amor que Santiago siente por ella. Andresito es dado de alta y por fin regresa a su hogar. Meche planea celebrarle a Rosario sus 15 años para invitar a Jorge Luis y verlo de nuevo.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña: Cena arruinada
programme.desc: Valentina idea un plan para saber el pasado de José Miguel. Sandra sufre al saber que su madre jamás aceptará su relación con Felipe. Isabel decide alejarse de Federico para evitar malentendidos.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Marichuy se cae por las escaleras y queda inconsciente. Ana Julia culpa a Candelaria del accidente, pero Candelaria también la acusa. Patricio se siente mal por la discusión y cae inconsciente.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.sub-title: Ni el tiempo ni la distancia
programme.desc: Patricio sufre una pequeña embolia y pierde la movilidad de un brazo. Por otro lado, Ana Julia se roba el alhajero con las flores de Marichuy.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: El Dr. Durán invita a Juan Miguel a trabajar con él. Cande encuentra el joyero de Marichuy en la basura. Patricio le exige a Marichuy que se olvide de Juan Miguel. Ana Julia se lleva a Mayita sin avisar, dejando a todos muy angustiados.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Ana Julia llega con Mayita y miente al decir que le había avisado a Cande. Las cirugías de Juan Miguel fracasan, pero el doctor Durán le pide que no se rinda. Ana Julia le miente a Juan Miguel y a Marichuy inventando romances para separarlos.

programme.title: Triunfo del amor
programme.desc: María va a buscar a Victoria para pedirle trabajo pero ella la trata muy mal María descubre que Max le mintió y que su nombre no es Fabián.

programme.title: Triunfo del amor
programme.desc: Max sigue a María y le pide perdón por haberle mentido. Milagros ayudará a Nati a encontrar a su alma gemela. Antonieta le pide a María que se aleje de Max pues va a sufrir mucho. Max le dice a María que quiere estar con ella y la besa.

programme.title: Sortilegio: Espía en la oficina
programme.desc: Bruno piensa utilizar a Katia como espía en la oficina de Alex. Victoria comienza a enamorarse de Fernando. Paula consigue quedarse en casa de Alex. Alex visita a Meche y le pregunta sobre Pedro, pero ella niega conocerlo.

programme.title: Abismo de pasión: Un bebé para Florencia
programme.desc: Paloma sufre al saber que Gael se casará con Elisa. Sabrina le confiesa a Elisa que Paolo la había enamorado para conseguirle un bebé a Florencia.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña: Sacrificio de amor
programme.desc: Valentina le pide a José Miguel que evite encontrarse con Rosendo. Ivana se alegra al saber que, gracias a Toledo, Isabel podría quedar en libertad.

programme.title: La usurpadora: Instinto
programme.desc: Verónica llama a casa de Piedad y ella comienza a sospechar que Carlos Daniel siente algo por ella, pues él se emociona con la llamada. Estefanía disfruta de su nueva vida con Willy y su futuro bebé.

programme.title: El manantial: Declaración de guerra
programme.desc: Alfonsina descubre la puesta en escena de Gilberto en complicidad con Bárbara y habla con ella. Luego, ella tiene una cita.

programme.title: Imperio de mentiras: Momentos difíciles
programme.desc: Majo amenaza con matar a Darío. Elisa y Leonardo no pueden superar no estar juntos pero saben que la investigación los separa. Victoria enfrenta a Sonia y Fabricio besa a Elisa sorpresivamente.

programme.title: La Gata: Advertencia
programme.desc: Mariano habla con Lorenza y le dice que Esmeralda no es una mala mujer. Por otro lado, una compañera de Esmeralda le dice que tenga cuidado con su jefe.

programme.title: La que no podía amar: Locura de amor
programme.desc: Vanesa le promete a Rogelio que cuidará de Cynthia para evitar que se mate. Mercedes le aconseja a Rocío que le dé a Esteban la oportunidad para enamorarla. Gustavo idea un plan para evitar que Cynthia continúe alterada.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche: Vamos al cine
programme.desc: Ludovico se compromete a llevar a toda la familia al cine, pero las cosas no salen como esperaba y al final ninguno logra disfrutar la película.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Paco está muy triste porque lo despidieron de su trabajo por culpa de Emilia. Fran se enamora de Silvana, su psicóloga, y termina seduciéndola.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.sub-title: No me importa que me digan mujeriego
programme.desc: Paco regresa con Miranda, su exnovia, y la lleva a vivir a su casa. Todo va bien hasta que llega Lorena y el mundo se le viene abajo.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Pedro se dedica a buscar mujeres por Facebook, y ante el asombro de Luis, conoce a una chica guapísima Luis tiene curiosidad y decide aplicar la misma técnica para encontrar al amor de su vida.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Silvia, desesperada por conocer hombres, renta una habitación de su departamento por medio de una aplicación un hombre apuesto renta el cuarto, ella se enamora, pero aparece la ex novia y comienzan los problemas.

programme.title: XHDRBZ
programme.desc: Al derecho y al Derbez cumple 10 años en la televisión. Alz y Heimer regañan a su nieto. Julio Esteban lee una carta muy particular a su público. La cocina de Don Pepe Roni trae diferentes recetas para morirse de la risa.

programme.title: XHDRBZ
programme.desc: La gente le hace preguntas a la licenciada Castañeda. El Súper Portero hace que Mara Patricia Castañeda salga de su programa furiosa debido a sus intervenciones.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: Cipriano hace una reunión y le informa a los empleados que el hotel recibirá a una convención de cirqueros. El Vitor conoce a un payaso, él le cuenta la historia de su triste vida y Vitor decide ayudarlo siendo parte de su show.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: Cirpriano les dice a los empleados que tienen que desalojar el hotel porque lo van a renovar. Los empleados dicen que desempeñan muy bien su trabajo y que es injusto que no les paguen.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Natasha se encuentra con una presuntuosa y molesta excompañera de la escuela. Vítor y Albertano deciden hacer pasar a Natasha por una exitosa millonaria que vive rodeada de lujos y servidumbre para poner a la presumida en su lugar.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Vítor y Albertano deciden que lo suyo es ser jefes, y por ello compran una fábrica para producir accesorios para automóvil.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Rosa recomienda a su hermano Albertano para presentar el nuevo shampoo Placentex Antiesponge. Maria le plancha el uniforme de Elvis y provoca los celos de Doña Lucha, que se lo arruga.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: El Chino necesita visitar el Museo de Antropología e Historia para un trabajo de la escuela. María se ofrece a acompañarlo y compromete a Albertano a ir con ellos. Sin embargo, los jóvenes pasan una romántica tarde hasta que se acuerdan lo prometido.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Los alumnos hacen una protesta, pues con el entrenamiento de fútbol no tienen tiempo de estudiar. Roberta propone entrenar los fines de semana y todos se ponen en su contra.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Sol golpea a Anita porque cree que Tomás la dejó por su culpa. Miguel le dice a Mia que siente que su relación se esta estancando.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Rocco y Mia hablan sobre los problemas de Vico. Tomás se emborracha y besa a la fuerza a la maestra Fátima, Gastón lo descubre y lo reporta. Vico intenta denunciar a su papá sin éxito alguno. Franco invita a Alma y su familia a pasar Navidad.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Franco se lesiona y le pide a Alma que lo lleve con el médico. Alma se enfurece con Gandía al saber que fue destituida de su cuerpo de porristas. Martín se anuncia como el tutor del quinto grado.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Se alista la posada de Roberta. Gandía le da un regalo a Alicia. Tomás invita a Anita a la posada. Lola descubre que Santos no es su amigo secreto. Santos se le declara a Lupita, ella acepta, pero Nico llega inesperadamente a la posada.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Es la cena de Navidad y Marina, la mamá de Mia, se presenta en casa de Franco para decirle toda la verdad. Rocco le dice a Mia que cree que el papá de Vico la golpea. Alma y Franco hablan de los problemas similares que tienen.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Alma le advierte a Reverte que no permitirá que le diga la verdad a Roberta y viajará con ellos. José le pide a Luciano que trabaje en una empresa para que investigue un asunto. Iñaki se burla de Diego.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Miguel invita a Sabrina al Vacance Club Pilar y Sol pretenden saber cuál es el peor secreto de Mia para divulgarlo Diego le dice a Roberta que nunca pensó que se dejaría dominar Lupita no sabe si regresar con Nico o andar con Santos.

programme.title: Simplemente María: Miedos
programme.desc: María teme que Alejandro descubra que Juan Pablo es su hijo y que al saberlo se lo quite. María se enfrenta a Alejandro y le deja en claro que no lo quiere cerca de ella ni de su hijo.

programme.title: Muchacha italiana viene a casarse
programme.desc: Los agentes de la policía encuentran el bote de veneno con el que mataron a Dante en el cuarto de Pilar. Por su parte, el médico le avisa a Gael que el corazón que tenía no es compatible con el de Gianna.

programme.title: Muchacha italiana viene a casarse
programme.desc: Fidel le dice a Eloísa que con la autopsia descubrieron que Dante fue envenenado y Pilar es la principal sospechosa. Fiorella le dice a Pedro que cree que está embarazada. Al mismo tiempo, se entera que podría ser hija de Sergio.

programme.title: Muchacha italiana viene a casarse

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom teams up with his friend Rob Ida to continue the search for cars in New York City. After visiting a few locations, he follows a lead on a late '30s LaSalle, a key piece in a massive collection and one of the best discoveries on the show. Rarely do we come across barn finds in perfect condition that aren't too rusted, yet only need minimal work to get them running. Welcome to this extraordinary collection – 40 barn finds featuring various makes and models, each waiting to be discovered and find new homes.

programme.title: Will It Run?
programme.desc: This Dodge Challenger was parked in the early '90s and hasn't been touched since. Can Davin bring it back to its former glory and get it running and driving again?

programme.title: Will It Run?
programme.desc: Last time we got this iconic 1970 Dodge Challenger TA 340 Six Pack running, but we weren't satisfied with just that. We wanted to see it back on the road again too. (We also wanted to give it a good detailing!)

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom heads to Great Britain in search of some exotic barn finds and has some great luck at his first location where he discovers a Mercedes-Benz 500SEC AMG and a Jaguar XJS TWR.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom forgoes driving his 1939 Ford Woody Wagon in favor of another car that he's owned for years: his Fern Mist 1953 Ford Ranch Wagon.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: It has always been Tom's dream to open up a barn door and see either a Jaguar XK120 or 140 Roadster sitting inside. Tom gets to relive his dream twice when he finds two Jaguar XK's sitting only a quarter-mile from one another.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom teams up with Davin Reckow of our Redline Rebuild series to uncover some iron in northern Michigan.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom discovers a warehouse full of rare Brass Era cars and desirable Mid-60s classics that are so packed in that he has to crawl through a Toronado to get to a Corvette.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: During the last stretch of his trip with the 1962 Ford Country Sedan wagon, Tom finds a Pontiac GTO Judge and a '57 Chevy Bel Air convertible.

programme.title: The Driver's Seat
programme.desc: This is the new Bugatti Tourbillon, the successor to the Veyron and the Chiron, due to be delivered in 2026. Its looks are very much evolution rather than revolution but unlike its predecessors the Tourbillon doesn't have a turbocharged W16 engine, instead it has a naturally aspirated, 8.3-litre V16 developed with Cosworth. This produces 1000hp on its own but in conjunction with three electric motors the Tourbillon has a combined hybrid system output of 1800hp (1775bhp).As you can hear in this video, it is a pretty incredible sounding engine, revving to 9000rpm. It's a distinctive sound too and for comparison we've included the soundtracks of a couple of its naturally aspirated hypercar rivals - the 6.5-litre V12 from the Aston Martin Valkyrie and the 3.9-litre V12 from the GMA T.50 (both also developed with Cosworth).Bugatti's Director of Design, Frank Heyl, talks Henry Catchpole around all the fascinating exterior details of the 3.8mIllion Euro Tourbillon but we think the interior is perhaps even more spectacular. With clear influence and inspiration taken from mechanical watches the titanium dials are wonders to behold. The steering wheel is pretty crazy too…And talking of watches, the car's name, Tourbillon, means whirlwind in French, but it is a word widely associated with a complicated mechanism found in watches. As Henry explains, with the help of a Ulysse Nardin, it was invented in 1795 to negate the impact of gravity and improve the accuracy of timekeeping in pocket watches.Of course, this being a Bugatti, it is incredibly fast, with a top speed of 276mph (445kph). It is also capable of 0-62mph in 2sec, 0-124mph in under 5sec, 0-186mph in under 10sec and 0-248mph in under 25sec. But in the age of the hyper EV and cars like the the Bugatti's cousin, the Rimac Nevera, pure performance doesn't seem to carry the sway that it once did, so where does that leave the Tourbillon? Catchpole thinks that the answer can be found in the quartz crisis of the 1970s and what followed.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: As a child, one of Julia's favorite sandwiches was an ice cream sandwich. Jacques was a stick of chocolate between two pieces of bread. Today, Julia's favorite is the Croque Monsieur, or pressed and baked ham & cheese. Of course, Jacques provides a variation he calls a Croque Madam. A close second they can both agree on is the New England lobster roll, served on a toasted hot dog bun.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Julia and Jacques prepare artichokes—several ways—including artichoke hearts stuffed with spinach and mushroom Duxelle. Julia demonstrates her secret to ever-green cooked string beans and butter bruised peas. Jacques counters with his aromatic Tomato Provencal.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Sara travels to Juneau to learn how locals are turning wild and foraged food to become culinary entrepreneurs. She talks to a fish biologist about wild salmon and learns the traditional way to make Cedar Planked Salmon with an Alaska Native home cook. On the side, foraged sea asparagus. Back home Sara shows us an easy way to make any fish with her Salmon in a bag with Borscht Beets.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Chinese immigrants were the backbone of Vancouver where Sara takes a culinary tour of its Chinatown. She learns to make two appetizers cooked with tea and samples Dim Sum. Then local Judy Lam Maxwell shows her a Chinese dumpling mashup filled with Korean Bulgogi. Back home, Sara quickly whips up some Baby Egg Rolls with Soy dipping sauce.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Who doesn't love Italian food? Sara's got some of your favorites made with just a little twist. Like delicious ravioli made with won ton skins to save time, or Lasagna made with Polenta rather than noodles. Her homemade pizza dough is super simple. For a show stopper, try her Butternut Squash Farrotto, just like risotto but with the ancient grain farro. On top, delicious fried sage.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Spot Prawns are so beloved in Vancouver. Sara learns fascinating facts about the critters from a local commercial fisherman, then joins a Vancouver home cook to prepare a Spot Prawn Risotto. Prawns are also on the menu in Miami where a Cuban grandmother shows Sara her recipe for Camarones Enchilados after a spirited food tour of the city's legendary Calle Ocho neighborhood.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Sara's viewers love 5 ingredient recipes, so why not six? Her frittata has a secret ingredient – leftover spaghetti – with rich Brie and Bacon. You could save the spaghetti from another pasta favorite – Peppery Broccoli Pasta with Feta. Her Duck confit with Braised leeks and sauerkraut is nice enough for company. Plus, Sara answers a viewer's question about perfectly flattened chicken breasts.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Fall and winter holidays call for big celebrations and, of course, lots of baking! For Thanksgiving – Roasted Glazed Pears Topped with Shortbread Pecan brittle and Crème Fraiche. For Christmas Eve, a comforting Warm Chocolate Cheesecake. And for Christmas morning – Sticky Buns that are super quick because they don't require yeast. On Ask Sara, answers to a viewer's question about vanilla beans.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Meatballs are so universally beloved almost every culture has a version. In Catalonia, Sara joins local cook Juame Vidal to make Meatball tapas with Peas from his garden. Moroccan Meatball Tagine with Couscous is achievable at home with a slow cooker – master Michele Scicolone shows us how. Sara's got her take – meatballs with a spicy Tex-Mex kick.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: When it's hot and muggy outside Sara keeps things cool with three recipes made without turning on the oven. First, Cold Southwestern Gazpacho that uses summer's bounty from the garden. Grilled steak tops a cool mushroom and tomato salad, and then, a refreshing Watermelon Screwdriver.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Sara travels to the West Coast for some delectable California food. She visits a Sacramento farmer and joins him and a local chef to make sushi two ways. In Napa Sara discovers a book club with a difference – they only read cookbooks, and each make a dish from that month's selection. Sara makes Shrimp Tikka with Mango Chutney with a member to bring to the group's dinner party.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Quick to make and much beloved, tacos are a staple on the weekday dinner table. Sara has her own recipe for Duck Tacos, then travels to Miami to learn a Cuban taco mashup with blogger Patty Ruiz – Chicken Vaca Frita Tacos. Almost a taco but just as good – Sara's Nacho Pie.

programme.title: Repo Basher vs. Matt
programme.desc: Matt, Froy, and Lou get a tip on a car whose owner has a boyfriend known for taking his fists to repossessors. Then, Lou and Matt derail an international expedition when they haul off with a tourist bus. And, Sonia and Froy bring some unwanted heat to a promotion for an energy drink by trying to repo the marketing truck.

programme.title: Tactical Planning
programme.desc: Matt and Froy walk into a moral gray area when they repossess a vehicle by stealing it. Then, Sonia and Matt discover their target van is being used in an investigation of highly toxic material. And, Matt poses as a valet to retrieve a car from an irate diner and his befuddled date.

programme.title: Four Wheel Surprise
programme.desc: First, Lou and Matt confront a big-time player and his bodyguards at a Brazilian restaurant. Then, Sonia and Lyndah head to a yard sale to get a vehicle away from the car's owner and her out-of-control friend. And finally, the whole team hits the beach in an effort to get a truck-load of ATV's away from a gang of knife-wielding beach bums.

programme.title: Breakdowns and Beatdowns
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy head into a bad part of town to find that their target car is owned by bat-equipped gang bangers. Then, a seemingly friendly teacher and an assistant principal nearly come to blows when Froy and Sonia come around to repossess one of their vehicles Then, And finally, after the tow truck breaks down on the side of the road, Lou, Matt, and Froy are left with no options and stuck in the middle of a violent dispute between some gun-wielding neighbors.

programme.title: You Again?
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Lou get the shock a lifetime when they repossess a car from an irate doctor whom they know all too well from an earlier incident. This time he's twice as angry, and he's dead-set against giving up his car again. Then, Sonia, Matt, and Lyndah go undercover as college students to extract an extremely expensive bicycle from an extremely irate athlete. And finally, Lou and Froy head to church to repossess a van from a minister with a terrible problem.

programme.title: Scavenger Hunt
programme.desc: First, Lou and Froy transform their search for a small dirt bike into a quasi-reality show, getting a group of young smart-asses trapped into their own web. Then, Sonia and Matt head to the business district for a different sort of quarry - a high-end luxury tanning bed owned by a less-than-sympathetic German. And finally, Lou and Matt set up a high stakes sting operation to bust a shady tow-truck driver, but will their best-laid plans go up in smoke?

programme.title: The Dune Buggy
programme.desc: First, Lou and Froy tail an upper class debtor to an upscale restaurant where the food is almost as unpalatable as its clientele's attitude. Then, Lyndah and Froy head to a residential district to repossess a van that is busy being loaded up with stolen electronics by a dangerous pair of criminals. And finally, Matt and Froy head to the desert to sneak an extremely rare top-of-the-line dune buggy from a crew of dedicated off-roaders.

programme.title: High and Low Spirits
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia find themselves in the middle of a baffling marital spat involving a man, his wife, and her untrustworthy yoga instructor. Then, Sonia and Lyndah hit the fashion district to repossess a van from a designer who's way ahead of the curve in terms of the fashion world, but way behind on her payments. And finally, Matt and Froy spoil spirits when they head to a carwash to reclaim a vehicle from a group of vicious, scantily-clad sorority girls.

programme.title: Repo Outside the Box
programme.desc: First, Matt and Sonia attempt to repossess a car from a group of cleaver-wielding short-order cooks with a taste for violence. Then, it's trouble in paradise as Matt and Froy take on the task of reclaiming a beach-scene-on-wheels filled with irate models. And finally, Sonia and Matt find themselves outmatched by a well-armed street gang and its charismatic leader.

programme.title: Horse Semen & the Rolls Royce Golf Cart
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia head out to the farm to repossess a truck from an entitled equestrian who would rather die than let the repo team get their hands on what's in the back. Then, Lou and Sonia stumble into the middle of a prolonged business dispute between a flower lady and her displeased client. And finally, Sonia and Froy hit the links to reclaim a high-end Rolls Royce golf cart from a snob who thinks he's too good to pay his bills.

programme.title: Involuntary Voluntary
programme.desc: Lou and Matt inadvertently become pawns in an elaborate and misguided lesson perpetrated by a cheating husband upon his mistress. Then, Matt and Lou attempt to take a vehicle away from a debtor who is so drunk he doesn't remember agreeing to give his car away voluntarily. And, Froy and Sonia try to take a limousine away from its shotgun-wielding driver and his two suspiciously-dressed passengers.

programme.title: Froy's Bait and Lou's Cake
programme.desc: Lou and Froy set out some bait in a gated community to attract a security guard who's slow to make his payments, but quick to pull out his pepper spray. Then, Matt and Lou crash a wedding to repo a car from a truant DJ, but will they be able to get away unscathed when the party turns on them? And, Lou and Froy confront a gang of bikers in a back alley. Will the repo team's pleas for patience and calm be enough to overcome the angry bikers' bats and chains?

programme.title: Blow-Up and Cool Down
programme.desc: Lou and Lyndah reclaim a riding mower from a housewife and her grab-happy husband. Then, Sonia and Matt head out on a scorcher of an afternoon for a repossession. Will they be able to beat both the heat and a pair of geriatric debtors? And, Sonia and Lyndah are left without words when they see the dark and embarrassing secret held in the backseat of a debtor's unpaid vehicle.

programme.title: The Car That Rolled Away
programme.desc: Lou and Lyndah try to negotiate a set of keys away from a raucous group of drunken outdoorsmen. Then, Froy and Lyndah repo a vehicle from a unruly and untalented guitarist. Plus, Froy and Sonia bite off more than they can chew when they try to reclaim an SUV from a confused and embittered former football player.

programme.title: Naked and Dangerous
programme.desc: Sonia and Lyndah try to repossess a hot tub away from a group of upset partiers. Then, Lou and Matt try to negotiate with a pair of unintelligible and enraged parade participants. And, Lou and Lyndah must repo a car from a group of old men.

programme.title: Contemporary Color
programme.desc: In the summer of 2015, legendary musician David Byrne staged an event at Brooklyn's Barclays Center to celebrate the creativity of color guard: synchronized dance routines involving flags, rifles, and sabers, colloquially known as “the sport of the arts.” The result is CONTEMPORARY COLOR, a bold and irrepressible snapshot of a one-of-a-kind live experience. Directed by Bill Ross and Turner Ross.

programme.title: Rigged: The Voter Suppression Playbook
programme.desc: Narrated by Jeffrey Wright, Rigged chronicles how our right to vote is being undercut by a decade of dirty tricks – including the partisan use of gerrymandering and voter purges, and the gutting of the Voting Rights Act by the Supreme Court. The film captures real-time voter purges in North Carolina and voter intimidation in Texas. Directed by Michael Kasino.

programme.title: The Brink
programme.desc: THE BRINK follows Steve Bannon for a year leading up to the 2018 mid-term elections in the United States, shedding light on his efforts to mobilize and unify far-right parties in order to win seats in the May 2019 European Parliamentary elections. To maintain his power and influence, the former Goldman Sachs banker and media investor reinvents himself — as he has many times before — this time as the self-appointed leader of a global populist movement. A keen manipulator of the press and gifted self-promoter, Bannon continues to draw headlines and protests wherever he goes, feeding the powerful myth on which his survival relies. Directed by Alison Klayman.

programme.title: American Dharma
programme.desc: Errol Morris turns his lens on Stephen K. Bannon. In a 16-hour interview, Morris questions him about his background, values, world view and his current feelings about Trump. Directed by Errol Morris.

programme.title: Soros
programme.desc: Billionaire activist George Soros is one of the most influential and controversial figures of our time. He is maligned by ideologues on both the left and the right for daring to tackle the world's problems. With unprecedented access to the man and his inner circle, director Jesse Dylan follows Soros and pulls back the curtain on his personal history, private wealth, and public activism.

programme.title: On Safari
programme.sub-title: The Outpost Lodge, Northern Kruger National Park, Limpopo Province
programme.desc: Sika's Safari Adventure starts in the Northern Kruger National Park in the Limpopo Province, where THE OUTPOST Lodge rests high on a hill encompassed by stunning vistas of the Luvuvhu River set in the Makuleke Region that falls in the epicentre of the Great Limpopo Park, which comprises Kruger National Park, the Gaza National Park in Mozambique and the Gonarezhou National Park in Zimbabwe. Designed by an Italian born architect, Enrico Daffonchio using simple, clean lines and combining elements of steel and canvas, the stunning contemporary design of this Luxury Kruger Park Lodge emphasizes its beautiful surrounds but blends in with the Wilderness that is it's home.

programme.title: On Safari
programme.sub-title: Jamala Madikwe, Madikwe Game Reserve, North West Province
programme.desc: JAMALA MADIKWE, Sika's second Safari destination has been awarded “Most Romantic Lodge in South Africa” and is set around a Game-rich waterhole in the malaria-free Madikwe Game Reserve of the North West Province along the border of Botswana. Once an area consisting mainly of Cattle farms before it was transformed into a Wildlife Reserve in the early 90's. Today, the Reserve supports a thriving and incredible diversity of Species due to the fact that it lies in an ecological transition zone between the Kalahari and Lowveld Wilderness.

programme.title: Shades of Red

The works showcase red's emotive power, from fiery abstract paintings to crimson-hued photographs, offering a visual journey through the spectrum of human emotions.

programme.title: Shades Of Orange

programme.title: Shades Of Yellow

programme.title: Shades of Color: Shades of Green
